title: Thun、Bern — 生活費、住宅、移住ガイド [2026]
description: Thun、Bernの完全ガイド：生活費、住宅価格、近隣地域、リモートワークの準備、移住のヒント。
content:
概要

ThunはBernにある人口44,000の都市です。A picturesque city on Lake Thun at the foot of the Alps, famous for its medieval castle, the Aare riverfront, and as a gateway to the Bernese Oberland.

Last updated: July 12, 2026
